data.name: Abemaciclib
data.description: CDK4 and CDK6 inhibitor for high-risk, node-positive, early stage, HR+, HER2- breast cancer

data.name: Standard Adjuvant Endocrine Therapy
data.description: Physician's choice, combined with Abemaciclib in Arm A

data.name: Standard Adjuvant Endocrine Therapy
data.description: Physician's choice, administered alone in Arm B

data.name: Tamoxifen
data.description: Example of standard adjuvant endocrine therapy

data.name: Letrozole
data.description: Example of an aromatase inhibitor used as standard adjuvant endocrine therapy

data.name: Anastrozole
data.description: Example of an aromatase inhibitor used as standard adjuvant endocrine therapy

data.name: Exemestane
data.description: Example of an aromatase inhibitor used as standard adjuvant endocrine therapy

data.name: GnRH Agonist
data.description: Used for ovarian function suppression as part of standard adjuvant endocrine therapy

data.name: Loperamide
data.description: Antidiarrheal therapy, prescribed for management of diarrhea in Arm A patients

data.name: Bone-modifying agents
data.description: Permitted standard of care, such as bisphosphonates and denosumab

data.name: Bisphosphonates
data.description: Example of a permitted bone-modifying agent

data.name: Denosumab
data.description: Example of a permitted bone-modifying agent

data.name: Antiemetics
data.description: Permitted for supportive care

data.name: Fluoroquinolones
data.description: Broad-spectrum antibiotics, prescribed for severe diarrhea or febrile neutropenia

data.name: Steroids
data.description: Considered for treating potential colitis in severe diarrhea cases, with endoscopic documentation recommended

data.name: Topical vaginal estrogen therapy
data.description: Permitted if all other non-hormonal options are exhausted

data.name: Fulvestrant
data.description: Adjuvant treatment with fulvestrant is not allowed at any time during the study

data.name: Exogenous reproductive hormone therapy
data.description: Includes birth control pills, hormone replacement therapy, or megestrol acetate

data.name: Megestrol acetate
data.description: Prohibited as a concurrent exogenous reproductive hormone therapy or other anticancer therapy

data.name: CDK4 and CDK6 inhibitor (other than Abemaciclib)
data.description: Patients previously treated with any CDK4 and CDK6 inhibitor are excluded

data.name: Endocrine therapy for breast cancer prevention
data.description: Includes tamoxifen or aromatase inhibitors previously received for prevention

data.name: Raloxifene
data.description: Patients previously treated with raloxifene are excluded

data.name: Strong CYP3A inhibitors
data.description: Should be substituted or avoided if possible (e.g., clarithromycin)

data.name: Strong CYP3A inducers
data.description: Should be substituted or avoided if possible (e.g., rifampin)

data.name: Substrates of P-glycoprotein, BCRP, OCT2, MATE1, MATE2-K with narrow therapeutic index
data.description: Should be substituted or avoided if possible (e.g., digoxin, dofetilide, metformin)

data.name: Grapefruit or grapefruit juice
data.description: Patients should avoid consumption while receiving abemaciclib due to CYP3A interaction

data.name: Adjuvant chemotherapy
data.description: Washout period of at least 21 days required before randomization

data.name: Adjuvant radiotherapy
data.description: Washout period of at least 14 days required before randomization

data.name: Experimental treatment in a clinical trial
data.description: Washout period of at least 30 days or 5 half-lives (whichever is longer) required before randomization

data.name: Standard Adjuvant Endocrine Therapy
data.duration: Up to 2 years (on-study treatment period), then continue to complete at least 5 years total

data.name: Fluoroquinolones
data.duration: As needed for severe diarrhea or febrile neutropenia
